partitions.name: email-package
partitions.description: Create @pluralscape/email package with EmailAdapter interface, error types, stub/in-memory adapters, contract tests, Resend adapter, SMTP adapter, and email template system
reviewNotes: Minor: Object.create/defineProperty pattern could use private constructor overload, escapeHtml could use replaceAll

partitions.name: encrypted-email-storage
partitions.description: Server-side encrypted email storage with ADR, DB schema changes, encrypt/decrypt utilities, email resolution, and registration wiring

partitions.name: email-worker
partitions.description: Email-send job type, processEmailJob worker, service registry, startup wiring, and recovery key regeneration email
reviewNotes: Minor: initEmailAdapter and setEmailAdapterForTesting have identical implementations — consider documenting distinction
Minor: isTemplateVars type guard only checks typeof object — intentional per JSDoc (validated at enqueue time)

partitions.name: webhook-job-wiring
partitions.description: Register webhook delivery as BullMQ job with handler, wire dispatchWebhookEvent to enqueue jobs, and add delivery cleanup cron job
reviewNotes: Minor: test naming inconsistency, duplicated stubCtx helper, JSDoc clarity on retry layers

partitions.name: webhook-event-dispatch
partitions.description: Wire dispatchWebhookEvent calls for 9 identity events (member, group, fronting, lifecycle, custom-front) and 4 friend events
reviewNotes: Minor: Only member.service.test.ts has webhook dispatch assertions — remaining service tests mock but don't verify arguments

partitions.name: webhook-enhancements
partitions.description: Webhook secret rotation endpoint, test/ping endpoint, payload encryption when crypto key set, and signature verification guide
reviewNotes: Minor: WebhookTestResult could use discriminated union, abort/timeout test coverage gap, test helper secret type mismatch
